name: iso-provider
description: Browse ISO 9660 disc image contents for .dir

scripts.build: cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && mkdir -p dist && cp target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/iso_provider.wasm dist/provider.wasm
scripts.dev: cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && mkdir -p dist && cp target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/debug/iso_provider.wasm dist/provider.wasm
